app.title: Blender 5.2 LTS
app.author: makizar
app.description: a free and open-source 3D creation software
proposed_tests: Install Blender and render a simple scene
Check Blender's API support for custom plugins
Run a complex animation and measure render time
Compare Blender's performance with other 3D software
